title: Thomas the Impostor
writer: Jean Cocteau, Michel Worms, Georges Franju
actors: Emmanuelle Riva, Jean Servais, Fabrice Rouleau
plot: In the First World War, when Paris is expected to fall to the Germans, the attractive widow, Princesse de Bormes, organises a convoy of cars to evacuate the wounded from the front, and bring them back to her villa in Paris to recu...
